name: Potato Kugel (Potato Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel the potatoes.
2. Coarsely grate the potatoes into a large bowl filled with ice water. Let stand for at least 15 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Grease the inside of a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Drain the grated potatoes and pat dry.
6. Use about 5 1/2 cups of grated potatoes for 8 servings, adjusting as needed.
7. In a large bowl running at high speed, beat the eggs until thick and light.
8. Stir in the potatoes, potato flour, salt, baking powder, pepper, onions, and half the melted butter.
9. Mix well.
10. Turn into the prepared baking dish.
11. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes.
12. Brush the top with melted butter.
13. Continue baking, brushing the top with melted butter every 10 minutes, until the top is crusty and golden brown (roughly 45 minutes longer).
